briefing.headline: Cover water — spawn clear conditions reward moving baits that trigger reaction strikes.
briefing.gameplan:
In spawn with clear water and pre frontal conditions, moving baits presentations shine.

Wheeler: Keep paddle tail swimbaits near the bottom — fishing too far off bottom is the biggest mistake; use lighter line (12-lb fluoro) and heavier head to achieve deeper running depth and better action

Key adjustment for pre frontal: aggressive, faster retrieves — fish are feeding actively before the front.

primaryApproach.retrieve: Wheeler: Keep paddle tail swimbaits near the bottom — fishing too far off bottom is the biggest mistake; use lighter line (12-lb fluoro) and heavier head to achieve deeper running depth and better act
primaryApproach.targets: Focus on flat, grass, dock. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

alternateApproach.retrieve: Wheeler: Use a minnow-profile trailer (like CrushCity Freeloader) for natural, erratic movement - it adds realism and bulk without impeding the natural balsa-like hunting action of the ChatterBait.
alternateApproach.targets: Focus on flat, grass, dock. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

proInsights.insight: KVD: 'Fall spinnerbaits: downsize to 3/16oz in clear water with small blades to match young-of-year baitfish. For heavy grass, go bigger with willowleaf blades. To fish fast and deep, put smaller blades on a 3/4oz head — the Scorcher design lets y...
Johnston: Uses Garmin LiveScope Perspective Mode to spot individual bed fish in rippled conditions when you can't see them visually. Cast to them and catch on first attempt.

Wheeler: The 7'1" MH casting rod is great for jigs, spinnerbaits, and single-hook baits around tight cover like docks, laydowns, and overhangs; the 7'4" MH moderate-fast casting rod is great for offshore cranking and big swimbaits with its parabol...

briefing.depthStrategy: Pre-frontal spawning bass are active on beds in 2-5ft. Falling pressure often triggers new waves of fish to move onto beds. Target hard-bottom spawning flats, secondary pockets, and protected coves.
adjustIf: If the front stalls and conditions stabilize, dial back aggression and focus on higher-percentage structure
If water clarity decreases from wind or rain, upsize lures and switch to brighter colors
If moving baits aren't getting bit, slow down to a crawling retrieve or switch to a jig
